remember: Students will be able to recall the definition of electric charge, its types, and the concept of electric field.
Students will be able to identify the properties of conductors and insulators.
Students will be able to state the relation between electric field and electric potential.
understand: Students will be able to explain the concept of electric field lines and their direction.
Students will be able to understand the relationship between electric field and the force experienced by a charge.
Students will be able to describe the concept of electric dipole and its moment.
apply: Students will be able to calculate the electric field due to a point charge and a dipole.
Students will be able to determine the electric potential due to a point charge and a dipole.
Students will be able to apply the concept of electric field to solve problems involving charged particles.
analyze: Students will be able to compare and contrast the electric field and electric potential.
Students will be able to analyze the relationship between electric field and the force experienced by a charge in different scenarios.
Students will be able to evaluate the concept of electric dipole and its applications.

ncert_objectives: Explain the concept of electric charge and its properties.
Describe the concept of electric field and its relation to electric potential.
Derive the formula for the electric field due to a point charge and a dipole.
board_exam_objectives: To solve problems involving electric charges and fields, such as calculating electric field and electric potential.
To understand the behavior of charged particles in electric fields and to calculate the force experienced by a charge.
To apply the concept of electric dipole to solve problems in physics.
